## Summary
What does this PR do?

## Related issue
Closes # (issue number)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / new engine
- [ ] Refactor / performance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build

## Testing
- [ ] `cargo build --release` compiles
- [ ] Manual test: `curl "http://localhost:10080/search?q=test"` returns results
- [ ] If scraper change: tested with live HTML

## Version reference
Commit messages reference stage: `[alpha.3]`, `[beta.1]`, etc.
